title: Baal Veer
desc: Montu challenges Baalveer to score more than him in the exams. While Baalveer accepts the challenge, he is unaware of the fact that Montu has a gadget that helps him answer all the questions.

title: Baal Veer
desc: Bhayankar sends a ghost to distract the kids while they are preparing for the exams. Soon, the kids ask Baalveer for help. However, unable to trap the ghost, Baalveer approaches the fairies.

title: Baal Veer
desc: Montu and Baalveer bet on the exam results and decide that whoever scores less will shave his head.
